# AI Job Hunt Results - 2026-03-13 11:29:22

## ✅ MATCH: AI/Cloud Security Engineer @ MedReview Inc.
**Apply Link:** [Click Here to Apply](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/ai-cloud-security-engineer-at-medreview-inc-4383915676)
**📬 Contact Email:** info@medreview.com
**💰 Expected Salary:** Not specified
**🧠 AI Reasoning:** Candidate is highly specialized in Multimodal ML and High-Performance Systems using PyTorch and Go.

**📋 Key Requirements:**
- 3+ years ML experience
- PhD preferred

**🛠️ Required Skills:** PyTorch, Go, CUDA

### ✉️ Drafted Cold Email:

---
Subject: Elevate MedReview's AI/Cloud Security with Elite GPU Optimization

Hi [Recruiter's Name],

I'm Lakshya, a seasoned AI Researcher and Systems Engineer. MedReview's need for cutting-edge AI/Cloud Security aligns perfectly with my expertise in GPU optimization and multimodal representation learning. My work on "Adaptive Gradient Harmonization" directly mitigates modality dominance, enhancing unified learning systems—critical for robust security frameworks. Additionally, I designed AI infrastructure focusing on low-level GPU optimizations, crucial for efficient, real-time data processing in secure cloud environments.

Explore my projects at [https://ailakshya.in](https://ailakshya.in) to see how I can drive innovation at MedReview.

Looking forward to discussing how I can contribute.

Best,  
Lakshya
---

## ✅ MATCH: Machine Learning Engineer @ Jobgether
**Apply Link:** [Click Here to Apply](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-engineer-at-jobgether-4384826484)
**📬 Contact Email:** contact@jobgether.com
**💰 Expected Salary:** Not specified
**🧠 AI Reasoning:** Candidate highly specialized in Multimodal ML and High-Performance Systems (Go/PyTorch).

**📋 Key Requirements:**
- 3+ years ML experience

**🛠️ Required Skills:** PyTorch, Go, CUDA, Python

### ✉️ Drafted Cold Email:

---
Subject: Revolutionizing Machine Learning Systems at Jobgether

Hi [Recruiter's Name],

I'm Lakshya, an AI Researcher and Systems Engineer with a knack for optimizing ML systems. My work on Adaptive Gradient Harmonization directly addresses the challenge of modality dominance in unified representation learning, enhancing model robustness—a key need for Jobgether's ML systems. Additionally, my expertise in PyTorch GPU optimization can significantly boost your infrastructure's performance, ensuring efficient handling of complex ML tasks.

Let’s discuss how my technical skills align with Jobgether’s vision. Please explore my portfolio at [https://ailakshya.in](https://ailakshya.in) to see my work in action.

Looking forward to the opportunity.

Best,
Lakshya
---

## ✅ MATCH: Machine Learning Engineer @ TEEMA
**Apply Link:** [Click Here to Apply](https://ca.linkedin.com/jobs/view/machine-learning-engineer-at-teema-4383966644)
**📬 Contact Email:** info@teema.com
**💰 Expected Salary:** Not specified
**🧠 AI Reasoning:** Candidate is a highly specialized M.Tech AI graduate with expertise in Multimodal ML and High-Performance Systems using PyTorch and Go.

**📋 Key Requirements:**
- 3+ years ML experience
- PhD preferred

**🛠️ Required Skills:** PyTorch, Go, CUDA, Multimodal Representation Learning, GPU Optimization, RAG, Python, PostgreSQL

### ✉️ Drafted Cold Email:

---
Subject: Transform Machine Learning Systems at TEEMA with Proven Expertise

Hi [Recruiter's Name],

I’m Lakshya, an AI Researcher and Systems Engineer specializing in GPU optimization and multimodal representation learning. I noticed TEEMA's need for a Machine Learning Engineer adept at enhancing system efficiencies. My publication on "Adaptive Gradient Harmonization" directly addresses unified representation learning challenges, optimizing model performance across modalities—a crucial asset for your projects.

Additionally, my expertise in PyTorch GPU optimization ensures your ML models will operate at peak efficiency, reducing computational costs and accelerating deployment. I'd love to discuss how my experience can drive TEEMA’s ML initiatives forward.

Explore my work further at https://ailakshya.in. Looking forward to the possibility of contributing to your team.

Best,  
Lakshya
---

At Schrödinger, your need for optimized ML platforms aligns perfectly with my expertise in PyTorch GPU optimization. ## ✅ MATCH: Software Engineer 5 - Offline Inference, Machine Learning Platform @ Netflix
**Apply Link:** [Click Here to Apply](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/software-engineer-5-offline-inference-machine-learning-platform-at-netflix-4356220692)
**📬 Contact Email:** recruiter@netflix.com
**💰 Expected Salary:** Not specified
**🧠 AI Reasoning:** Candidate is a highly specialized M.Tech AI graduate with expertise in Multimodal ML and High-Performance Systems using PyTorch and Go.

**📋 Key Requirements:**
- 3+ years ML experience

**🛠️ Required Skills:** PyTorch, Go, CUDA, Multimodal Representation Learning, GPU Optimization, RAG, Python, PostgreSQL

### ✉️ Drafted Cold Email:

---
Subject: Elevating Offline Inference at Netflix with Elite GPU Optimizations

Hi [Recruiter's Name],

I’m Lakshya, an AI Researcher and Systems Engineer with a proven track record in building high-performance AI infrastructures.
